## Ensure Workplace Safety & Regulatory Compliance

Predict and prevent arc flash hazards with Care Labs’ arc flash analysis, customized for the Thailand industries. Make your power systems compliant with global standards like IEEE 1584, IEC, NFPA 70E, and other local standards. Protect and educate the workers with the right arc flash PPE and training.

Support

Benefit fully from Care Labs’ arc flash analysis to make your electrical structures free from hazards. We offer robust support from risk mitigation to preventive maintenance to accomplish power system goals.

Technical Support:

Safety And Compliance Support:

With us, safety is guaranteed, along with compliance with electrical safety standards, both local and global.

Our technology partner, ETAP, helps build reliable solutions for arc flash study services in Thailand. Achieve optimal results and cost-effective solutions from Care Labs with the power of ETAP software.
